Southwest National Parks Road Trip: This 10-day self-drive circuit from Las Vegas covers Zion, Bryce Canyon, Capitol Reef, Canyonlands, and Arches National Parks, returning via Monument Valley and Page, Arizona. The America the Beautiful Annual Pass ($80) covers all park entrance fees and pays for itself by the second park. Must-do hikes include Angels Landing and The Narrows in Zion (permit required for Angels Landing), Thor's Hammer in Bryce, and the Delicate Arch trail in Arches at sunset. Book campsites and lodges at least 6 months in advance for peak season travel between May and September.
